praty-upa-√viś P. -viśati, to sit down opposite to or before (acc.);
to beset or besiege a person (to make him yield),  MBh. ;  R.  :
Caus. -veśayate, to cause a person to beset or besiege another,  Āpast. ;
to oppose, resist,  R.
